perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses and a blue flat cap sits at a wooden table, holding a silver smartphone. He speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face. (2) He presents a clear smartphone case and a pack of screen protectors, pointing out the features. (3) He demonstrates applying a film to the back of the phone and then displays three different colored smartphones (silver, orange, and blue) to showcase the results of the protective film.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays continuously. A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a friendly, energetic, and professional tone. (2) As the man discusses the product, a subtle 'ding' sound effect highlights the appearance of the protective stickers. (3) The music maintains a consistent volume as the man finishes his presentation, with low studio-grade ambient silence in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "網路上的事" (Things on the internet) - Hook, curious tone. (2) "最近在iPhone17 Pro開賣的時候" (Recently when iPhone 17 Pro went on sale) - Functional, context. (3) "我發現有人不小心把背後玻璃刮花了" (I found someone accidentally scratched the back glass) - Functional, problem statement. (4) "嘿 imos 他賣的一般款或磁吸款的手機殼" (Hey, the standard or magnetic cases sold by imos) - Functional, brand introduction. (5) "竟然有貼心贈送了兩張背貼" (Actually includes two complimentary back stickers) - Functional, feature highlight. (6) "雙重保護" (Double protection) - Decorative, emphatic tone. (7) "是不是更安心一點啊" (Doesn't it feel more secure?) - Functional, rhetorical question.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Product Introduction -> Benefit Explanation -> Final Result Showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man is wearing a light green 'Athletics' t-shirt, a blue textured flat cap, glasses, and several beaded bracelets on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, white indoor wall with a wooden desk in the foreground. Some out-of-focus background elements are visible but indistinguishable.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Pain Point -> Product Solution -> Proof of Variety
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote imos smartphone cases and protective films by highlighting a specific value-add: the inclusion of free back-of-phone protective stickers, addressing the consumer fear of scratching expensive new devices like the iPhone 17 Pro.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal mention of the brand 'imos', physical demonstration of the product packaging, and specific callout of product features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3C Tim logo in the top left corner, use of variety-show style colorful captions, signature hat/glasses look.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density text overlay technique typical of short-form social media reviews in the Asian market to keep viewer attention.
